导师带人回本那个人最可靠【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239218564_64550275<br>vk.com/topic-239183346_64873986<br>vk.com/topic-239183291_66212784<br>vk.com/topic-239226396_64873935<br>vk.com/topic-239226430_65617661<br>vk.com/topic-239142189_65343521<br>vk.com/topic-239149155_64468561<br>vk.com/topic-239218360_65617663<br>vk.com/topic-239149137_65996113<br>vk.com/topic-239142243_64720475<br>vk.com/topic-239226397_65996116<br>vk.com/topic-239218341_66212788<br>vk.com/topic-239183420_65617666<br>vk.com/topic-239149295_64468563<br>vk.com/topic-239142234_64550278<br>vk.com/topic-239142264_64550279<br>vk.com/topic-239181080_65617668<br>vk.com/topic-239153802_65162695<br>vk.com/topic-239149212_65162692<br>vk.com/topic-239153751_66212789<br>vk.com/topic-239182912_65162696<br>vk.com/topic-239153621_66212790<br>vk.com/topic-239218536_64873992<br>vk.com/topic-239218529_65343523<br>vk.com/topic-239226542_65162697<br>vk.com/topic-239149163_64720480<br>vk.com/topic-239218407_65996121<br>vk.com/topic-239149172_65162698<br>vk.com/topic-239183258_65063408<br>vk.com/topic-239149196_64873993<br>vk.com/topic-239183234_64550282<br>vk.com/topic-239153716_64873994<br>vk.com/topic-239218433_64720481<br>vk.com/
